---
name: Feature request
about: A new tool, flag, or capability you'd like udit to grow
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What you want

<!-- The thing you wish udit could do. One sentence. -->

## Why

<!-- The agent workflow / Unity workflow that's currently awkward without it.
     Concrete examples are gold — "I'm doing X today via `udit exec` and Y" beats
     abstract requirements. -->

## Sketch (optional)

<!-- If you have an idea of the CLI shape:
     `udit foo bar --baz <value>` — does <thing>
     Or how the JSON response should look. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Existing commands you've tried, exec hacks you've used, why they fall short. -->

## Roadmap fit

<!-- Optional. Have you checked docs/ROADMAP.md to see whether this overlaps a
     planned phase? Pointer to the relevant phase, or "not on the roadmap" is fine. -->
